title: Client Side +
description: A mostly client side modpack. Enhance your vanilla Minecraft 1.21 experience with performance boosts, visual upgrades, and quality of life improvements, all designed for casual players and builders on vanilla servers.
body:
# **Client Side +**

Enhance your vanilla Minecraft experience with Client Side +
(This modpack will keep updataing if guys supporting me 🥰)

## **Overview**

Client Side + is designed to elevate your Minecraft gameplay by focusing on performance improvements, visual enhancements, quality of life changes, functionality, and customization. This modpack ensures a smoother, more immersive, and visually appealing experience, all while maintaining the essence of vanilla Minecraft.

## **Main Features**

### Performance Improvements
- Smooth Gameplay: Enjoy a significant boost in FPS and reduced lag with mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore.
- Fast Loading: Get into the game faster with quicker startup times and less waiting thanks to ModernFix and Entity Culling.
- Efficient Memory Usage: Experience fewer crashes and smoother gameplay with Spark and Reese's Sodium Options.

### Visual Enhancements
- Shaders: Sildur's Basic Shaders, and Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Textures: Fresh Animations
- Improved Lighting: Iris and RyoamicLights.

### Quality of Life Changes
- Better Inventory Management: Simplify your inventory organization with Inventory Profiles Next and Mouse Tweaks.
- Enhanced HUD: Get more information at a glance with Status Effect Bars, Better Statistics Screen, and Better F3.
- Waypoints and Minimap: Never get lost again with Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's World Map.

### Functionality and Customization
- Custom Keybindings: Tailor your controls to fit your playstyle with Controlling and BindCommands.
- Advanced Settings: Tweak and fine-tune your game settings with Mod Menu.
- Modular Design: Enable or disable features to suit your preferences.

### Extra Features
- Voice Communication: Enhance multiplayer interactions with Simple Voice Chat and Voice Chat Soundboard.
- In-Game Utilities: Improve your gameplay experience with WorldEdit, Auto Totem, and Toro's Auto Attack.
- Customization: Personalize your game with Custom Crosshair Mod, Show Me Your Skin!, and Wavey Capes.

## Compatibility
- Minecraft Version: 1.21 Fabric
- Servers: Designed for use on vanilla servers. Note: This modpack is not compatible with modded servers.
  
## Purpose and Audience
### Client Side + is perfect for:
- Casual Players: Enjoy a smoother, more beautiful game without learning complex mods.
- Builders: Create stunning structures with textures and improved visuals.
- Vanilla Enthusiasts: Enhance your experience without losing the core essence of vanilla Minecraft.

## Installation and Usage
1. Click the Instal button
2. Launch Minecraft on modrinth app
3. Enjoy!



# Why Client Side +?

This modpack was created with the goal of improving the vanilla Minecraft experience by adding client-side mods that enhance performance, visuals, and usability. You'll still enjoy the core gameplay you love, but with added polish and quality.
